commands.review_summary:
The PR changes memory-core shadow database cleanup to attempt every `.memory-reindex-*` SQLite sidecar before rethrowing the first direct cleanup error, while keeping aged-orphan cleanup best-effort and adding regression tests for both paths.

PR surface: Source +14, Tests +64. Total +78 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main stops direct sidecar cleanup on the first `fs.rmSync` error, while the PR head continues through all suffixes and the PR body shows a real filesystem proof for that helper. I did not execute the Windows forced-reindex scenario in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair job is queued because current head has no discrete code finding; maintainer review and normal landing checks are the remaining path.
